---
title: "Horatia Katherine Frances Eden"
---

## Horatia Katherine Frances Eden

**Dates:** (b.1846)

**Maiden name:** (Gatty)

### Description

sister of Juliana Horatia (Gatty) Ewing

### Biography

She married (1889) Thomas Bainbridge Eden (b.1856/7), schoolmaster; she contributed to <i>MP</i> (1874).

### Letters

- Letter from June 10th 1885
- Letter from May 4th [1882?][[footnote:2]]
- Letter from June 7th 1880

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
